title: UI transformation (markdown, suggestions, stepper, cards, slide preview)
steps: Markdown rendering — install react-markdown, render all assistant messages as markdown instead of plain text with whitespace-pre-wrap. Handles the 'walls of text' feedback.

Suggestion buttons — render metadata.suggestions as clickable chips near the chat input. Only show on latest assistant message. Disable while isStreaming. Click calls createMessage(suggestionText) directly.

Progress stepper — Context > Brainstorm > Structure > Refine. Driven by latest metadata.phase. Forward-only (phase can advance but never regress). Defaults to 'context' for old convos with null metadata.

Extract message components — MessageList.tsx from App.tsx inline loop. Card-type dispatch based on metadata.messageType: QuestionCard, ChecklistCard, SlideCard, TipCard. Plain text fallback when metadata is null.
Slide preview panel — split-pane layout in structure/refine phases (chat left, preview right). Driven by latest metadata.slides. Full-width chat in context/brainstorm phases.
Backward compat + responsive — old messages with null metadata render as plain text. Mobile responsive layout.
acceptance_criteria: Assistant messages render as formatted markdown (headers, bullets, bold, code)
Suggestion buttons appear after each bot response with 2-3 clickable options
Suggestion buttons disabled during streaming, only shown on latest message
Stepper shows current phase, progresses forward only
Different card types render by metadata.messageType
Slide preview appears in structure/refine phases
Plain text fallback for old messages with no metadata

risks.detail: LLM might output inconsistent phase values. E.g. 'context' after previously outputting 'brainstorm'.
risks.mitigation: Forward-only high-water mark: stepper can only advance. Enum constraint in tool schema forces valid values.

risks.detail: User could click suggestion while streaming. Already guarded by isStreaming check in createMessage.
risks.mitigation: Also visually disable/hide suggestion buttons while isStreaming === true.

context.user_feedback_driving_changes: Markdown rendering and suggestion buttons are direct user requests. Stepper + cards + slide preview create the 'building together' experience that counters the 'interrogation' feeling.
context.depends_on_task_008: All UI features depend on metadata from structured output. Without metadata, everything falls back to plain text (today's behavior).
